name: What is the cheapest way to improve voice search for lawyers?
description: Focus first on your homepage, contact page, Google Business Profile, and one strong FAQ section.

mainEntity.name: What is the cheapest way to improve voice search for lawyers?

acceptedAnswer.text: A budget-friendly approach is to start with your homepage, contact page, Google Business Profile, and one high-intent FAQ section. Those pages usually give the fastest return because they combine local intent with clear action steps.
acceptedAnswer.description: Focus first on your homepage, contact page, Google Business Profile, and one strong FAQ section.
